channel.title: Storytelling on Starky Ink
channel.description: Recent content in Storytelling on Starky Ink

item.title: The Art of Storytelling
item.description: The Art of Storytelling Every story begins with a single spark — a character, a place, a question that won’t leave your mind. The art of storytelling isn’t about following rules or formulas. It’s about letting your imagination run free while still holding the reins tight enough to guide your reader through the world you’ve created. The Three Pillars Every great story rests on three foundations: Character — The people who inhabit your world must feel real.

item.title: The Short Story Canvas
item.description: The Short Story Canvas In a novel, you have room to wander. Room to build worlds, to develop characters over hundreds of pages, to let subplots bloom and wither. A short story is different. It’s a sprint, not a marathon. Every word must matter. The Flash Fiction Test Can you tell your story in 1,000 words? 500? 100? The constraint of length forces clarity. It forces you to find the heart of your story and cut everything that doesn’t serve it.
